Package com.rays.form

Class MyProfileForm

java.lang.Object
com.rays.form.MyProfileForm
public class MyProfileForm extends Object
Form class for managing user profile information. Used to capture and validate profile details of the logged-in user.
Author:
Saket

    loginId
